title: Laser's Foolmon Pack [Cobblemon]
description: Adds a few goofy Fakemons for April Fool's Day!
body:
# Laser's Foolmon Pack:
![sus](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/10ec48026aeb0fa7064e090e807fe8b4580dabba.png)

Laser's Foolmon Pack is an **EPIC,** totally **LEGIT,** super **AWESOME AND INCREDIBLE** addon for Cobblemon that adds a small handful of STUPENDOUS Fakemons specially made on April 1st (for no particular reason, of course of course).

### Pokemon added:
**Suslett** - Spawns underground (the same as Diglett) and in The End dimension.

**Sustrio** - Spawns underground (the same as Dugtrio) and in The End dimension.

**Minigant** - Spawns in floral biomes (has the same exact spawns as regular Lilligant. Its a single-stage evolution, so it doesn't evolve from Petilil like normal Lilligant).
